codeReview.summary: The implementation fully satisfies the feature requirements. Unix domain socket server is created on application startup at /tmp/cmux-linux.sock, accepts connections asynchronously via GSocketService, and sends a welcome message ('cmux-linux socket server ready') immediately upon connection. The code uses standard GIO patterns with proper error handling, NULL safety, and resource cleanup. 35 unit tests cover all major functionality.

summary: PASS - Feature socket-server (VAL-API-001) implementation is complete and correct. The Unix socket server creates /tmp/cmux-linux.sock on startup, accepts connections via GIO GSocketService, and sends welcome message on connect. Integration with main_gui.c is properly handled with startup and cleanup. 35 unit tests pass. No issues found.
